channel.title: GitHub SCSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: cobiwave/simplefolio
item.description: ⚡️ A minimal portfolio template for Developers

item.title: pages-themes/minimal
item.description: Minimal is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: vinceliuice/WhiteSur-gtk-theme
item.description: MacOS like theme for all gtk based desktops

item.title: pages-themes/hacker
item.description: Hacker is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: thingsym/hugo-theme-techdoc
item.description: The Techdoc is a Hugo Theme for technical documentation.

item.title: ermongroup/cs228-notes
item.description: Course notes for CS228: Probabilistic Graphical Models.

item.title: black7375/Firefox-UI-Fix
item.description: 🦊 I respect proton UI and aim to improve it.

item.title: andrewbanchich/forty-jekyll-theme
item.description: A Jekyll version of the "Forty" theme by HTML5 UP.

item.title: kitian616/jekyll-TeXt-theme
item.description: 💎 🐳 A super customizable Jekyll theme for personal site, team site, blog, project, documentation, etc.

item.title: IanLunn/Hover
item.description: A collection of CSS3 powered hover effects to be applied to links, buttons, logos, SVG, featured images and so on. Easily apply to your own elements, modify or just use for inspiration. Available in CSS, Sass, and LESS.

item.title: Dorota1997/react-frontend-dev-portfolio
item.description: Easy to adapt and deploy React portfolio inspired with solutions found at GitHub.

item.title: sujaykundu777/devlopr-jekyll
item.description: (FREE SITE GENERATOR) - A Customizable/Hackable portfolio jekyll theme where you can blog using Markdown or CMS 🚀 in minutes built for developers. (with CMS) ✨
